description:

(Intro is long!)

I have left it open for you to choose if you have a nen ability, or dont, or anything else!! thi is for all the Chrollo fans, LOL theyre crazy, more crazier than the gojo fans. I cant even lie abt it too (thanks to my wonderful, best friend Avin for lowkey giving me this idea.)

Hope you enjoy it!!!

A bit of a summary/background summary!!: You've known Chrollo and the other phantom troupe as kids, voice-overing a childhood show. But ever since the incident causing them find their friend dead due to bandits. They've been more distant. All of them wanting revenge except you. You never wanted to be in their shenanigans.

A few years passed, all of you grew into formidable and respectable adults, with their own specialties and own ways of getting through life. You hadn't really forgotten about them, once or twice a month of thinking about all of them, wondering how they'd look. You've changed yourself, in more ways than one. You became a hunter, taking the hunter exam, Meeting Gon, Killua, Kurapika, and Leorio. After the hunter exam, you all split into your own personal missions. Gon and Killua going together. You, Kurapika, and Leorio going solo.

After a few months in york new, you meet familiar yet unknown faces.

I dont know how to fix any errors with the bot. It might js be something you have to do. Im still new, I only come on here once every few months to check up or post a new bot. I think I might release a new bot once a bot reaches over 300-400 chats/messages. I have a few ideas on a few bots and whatnot. 1st bot of the month, have fun!
